runTitle: v8.11.169 Current Vercel Playwright MCP Check
coveredSurfaces: Feature card modal independent state reset

expertAssessments.rationale: Landing, four feature-card modals, diagram toggles, Vibe CI/CD tab, and modal state reset all passed on Vercel production.

Playwright MCP covered the core landing/modal surfaces. The MCP browser context closed during dashboard CTA interaction, so dashboard/auth/API checks were repeated with a direct Playwright browser smoke and recorded as an automation fallback rather than product failure.
Production /api/version reports v8.11.169 from GitLab pipeline 2532228902, /api/health is healthy, and Vercel usage remains billed 0.0000 USD.

usageChecks.summary: Billing period 2026-05-01..2026-05-18: effective 10.7667 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 9744. No unexpected billed usage.

artifacts.label: v8.11.169 current Vercel Playwright MCP check
artifacts.note: Playwright MCP verified landing/modal surfaces. A direct Playwright fallback verified /api/version, /api/health, and unauthenticated dashboard guard after MCP browser context closed during dashboard CTA click.

notes: Observed 401 /api/system only in a fresh unauthenticated browser context; classified as expected auth guard behavior.
Authenticated dashboard internals were intentionally skipped in this targeted current-state check because the fresh browser context redirects /dashboard to /login and AI live QA was not requested.
